jump five times.description: Press spacebar 5 times for repeated jumps

press tab.description: Move focus to the next field

next field.description: Move focus to the next field

previous field.description: Move focus to the previous field

back field.description: Move focus to the previous field

back tab.description: Move focus to the previous field

other window.description: Switch to the previously active window

open claude.description: Open Claude in browser (desktop app not installed)

claude new chat.description: Start a new Claude chat in browser

replace in note.description: Obsidian: search and replace in file

today's note.description: Obsidian: open today's daily note (requires Daily Notes plugin)

open vs code.description: VS Code not installed -- opens download page

read this.description: Magnifier: start reading aloud from cursor

start narrator.description: Start or stop Windows Narrator (screen reader)

live captions.description: Toggle live captions (transcribes any audio on screen)

mono audio.description: Open audio accessibility settings (mono audio, visual alerts)

sticky keys.description: Open sticky keys settings (press modifier keys one at a time)

mouse keys.description: Open mouse keys settings (control mouse with numpad)

pointer settings.description: Open mouse pointer size and color settings

eye control.description: Open eye control settings (requires compatible eye tracker)

text cursor settings.description: Open text cursor settings (thickness, color indicator)

immersive reader.description: Toggle immersive reader in Edge (clean reading mode)

read aloud.description: Start Read Aloud in Edge browser

open nvda.description: Open NVDA screen reader (free, must be installed)

open jaws.description: JAWS not installed -- opens product page

night light.description: Open night light settings (reduce blue light)

make text bigger.description: Open text size / visual accessibility settings

move to right monitor.description: Move active window one monitor to the right

move to left monitor.description: Move active window one monitor to the left

move to next monitor.description: Move active window one monitor to the right

send to far right.description: Move active window to the far-right monitor (2 steps right)

send to far left.description: Move active window to the far-left monitor (2 steps left)

send to middle monitor.description: Normalize to far left, then step once right to reach middle monitor

send to main monitor.description: Move active window to the main (far-left) monitor

restore window.description: Restore (un-maximize) the active window so it can be moved

send maximized right.description: Restore, move right one monitor, re-maximize

send maximized left.description: Restore, move left one monitor, re-maximize

remove file.description: Remove a file (preferred over 'delete file' to avoid collision with 'delete line')

open log.description: Open the Samsara log file in Notepad
